how_computed: Percentage of gold (service x scenario) cases where the agent's harness-observed token equals the gold observed token. A scenario the agent did not exercise (probe not emitted -> observed 'missing') counts as a mismatch. Denominator = all gold scenarios (3 services x 1 max_wait_correct + 6 endpoints x 6 per-endpoint scenarios = 39).
rationale: All four agents drive the same local timeout-gateway under the same 60s injected upstream delay, so the raw Timeout Enforcement Rate (how many endpoints return 504/408 within max_wait with the TCP connection closed) is a property of the gateway, not the agent (empirically 83.33% = 5/6: the deliberately non-compliant /inventory/low-stock returns 500, leaks the upstream URL + a stack frame, and leaves the connection open). Fidelity-to-gold instead measures each framework's test quality: did it copy the contract, compute max_wait_s = upstream_timeout_s + buffer_s, list every endpoint once in BOTH the delayed and restore phases with verbatim method/path, and so faithfully exercise every scenario that its observed tokens reproduce the gold table. The headline timeout_enforcement_rate_pct is still emitted by every agent as the task's QA finding.
pass_threshold: fidelity = 100% (agent reproduces every gold observed token)
fail_condition: fidelity < 100% (any scenario uncovered, or any probe mis-constructed / max_wait miscomputed so the observed token diverges from gold)
